---
title: "mETHYLotest NGS Analysis Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
    self_contained: true
params:
  project_dir: ""
  analyzed_samples: !r NULL
  excluded_samples: !r NULL
---

```{=html}
<style>
.summary-box {
  background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px;
  border-left: 4px solid #2980b9; padding: 12px 15px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.summary-box h4 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #2980b9; }
.summary-box p { margin: 2px 0; }
.metric-row { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin: 15px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.metric-card {
  flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 5px; background: #f5f5f5;
  border: 1px solid #e3e3e3; min-width: 120px;
}
.metric-card .value { font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; }
.metric-card .label { color: #666; font-size: 0.9em; }
.sig-card {
  display: inline-block; text-align: center; padding: 12px 20px;
  border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; margin: 5px; min-width: 110px;
}
.sig-card .big-num { font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.2; }
.sig-card .label { font-size: 11px; opacity: .85; }
.warn-box {
  background: #fdf2e9; border-left: 4px solid #e67e22;
  padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 10px 0;
}
.excluded-box {
  background: #fdedec; border-left: 4px solid #e74c3c;
  padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 10px 0;
}
.good-box {
  background: #d5f5e3; border-left: 4px solid #27ae60;
  padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 10px 0;
}
.info-box {
  background: #eaf2f8; border-left: 4px solid #3498db;
  padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 10px 0;
}
img { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; }
</style>
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ── Force figures to a LOCAL temp dir (avoids UNC/pandoc bug) ──
local_fig_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "mETHYLotest_report_figs/")
if (!dir.exists(local_fig_dir)) dir.create(local_fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6, dpi = 100, out.width = "100%",
  fig.path = local_fig_dir
)

library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

has_dt       <- requireNamespace("DT",        quietly = TRUE)
has_readxl   <- requireNamespace("readxl",    quietly = TRUE)
has_base64   <- requireNamespace("base64enc", quietly = TRUE)
has_pheatmap <- requireNamespace("pheatmap",  quietly = TRUE)

config_file <- file.path(params$project_dir, "Results", "project_config.R")
if (!file.exists(config_file)) stop("Config not found: ", config_file)

source(config_file)
cfg <- project_config
res_dir <- cfg$res_dir
robject_dir <- project_config$rds_dir

diff_cutoff_report <- if (!is.null(cfg$diff_cutoff)) cfg$diff_cutoff else 10
diff_qvalue_report <- if (!is.null(cfg$diff_qvalue)) cfg$diff_qvalue else 0.05

# ── Pheno ──
pheno_all <- NULL
if (has_readxl && !is.null(cfg$pheno_file) && file.exists(cfg$pheno_file)) {
  pheno_all <- as.data.frame(readxl::read_excel(cfg$pheno_file))
}

# ── Preload diff_results ──
diff_rds_path <- file.path(robject_dir, "diff_results_list.rds")
diff_results <- NULL
if (file.exists(diff_rds_path)) {
  diff_results <- tryCatch(readRDS(diff_rds_path), error = function(e) NULL)
}

# ── Preload validation results ──
val_results <- NULL
val_rds_candidates <- c(
  file.path(robject_dir, "validation_results.rds"),
  file.path(robject_dir, "Validation", "validation_results.rds")
)
for (vp in val_rds_candidates) {
  if (file.exists(vp)) {
    val_results <- tryCatch(readRDS(vp), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(val_results)) break
  }
}
has_val <- is.list(val_results) && length(val_results) > 0

# ── methylBase ──
meth_obj <- NULL
meth_rds <- file.path(robject_dir, "methylBase_united.rds")
if (file.exists(meth_rds)) {
  meth_obj <- tryCatch(readRDS(meth_rds), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(meth_obj) && !inherits(meth_obj, "methylBase")) meth_obj <- NULL
}

# ── Analyzed / Excluded IDs ──
analyzed_ids <- params$analyzed_samples
excluded_ids <- if (!is.null(params$excluded_samples)) params$excluded_samples else character(0)

if (is.null(analyzed_ids)) {
  if (!is.null(diff_results) && length(diff_results) > 0) {
    first_obj <- diff_results[[1]]
    if (inherits(first_obj, "methylDiff")) {
      analyzed_ids <- tryCatch(methylKit::getSampleID(first_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
    }
  }
}
if (is.null(analyzed_ids) && !is.null(meth_obj)) {
  analyzed_ids <- tryCatch(methylKit::getSampleID(meth_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
}

if (length(excluded_ids) == 0 && !is.null(pheno_all) && !is.null(analyzed_ids) &&
    !is.null(cfg$col_sampleID) && cfg$col_sampleID %in% colnames(pheno_all)) {
  excluded_ids <- setdiff(as.character(pheno_all[[cfg$col_sampleID]]), analyzed_ids)
}

pheno_analyzed <- NULL
if (!is.null(pheno_all) && !is.null(analyzed_ids) &&
    !is.null(cfg$col_sampleID) && cfg$col_sampleID %in% colnames(pheno_all)) {
  pheno_analyzed <- pheno_all[pheno_all[[cfg$col_sampleID]] %in% analyzed_ids, ]
}

# ── Helpers ──
embed_img <- function(img_path) {
  if (!file.exists(img_path)) return(NULL)
  if (has_base64) {
    raw <- readBin(img_path, "raw", file.info(img_path)$size)
    b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(raw)
    sprintf('<img src="data:image/png;base64,%s" style="max-width:100%%;" />', b64)
  } else {
    sprintf('![%s](%s)', basename(img_path), img_path)
  }
}

sig_card <- function(value, label, bg) {
  sprintf('<div class="sig-card" style="background:%s;"><span class="big-num">%s</span><br><span class="label">%s</span></div>',
          bg, value, label)
}
```

# Project Summary

```{r project_summary, results='asis'}
cat('<div class="summary-box">\n')
cat('<h4>Project Information</h4>\n')
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Name:</strong> %s</p>\n', cfg$project_name))
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Assembly:</strong> %s</p>\n', cfg$assembly))
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Context:</strong> %s</p>\n', cfg$context))
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Min Coverage:</strong> %dx</p>\n', cfg$min_coverage))

pip_str <- if (is.list(cfg$pipeline)) "Custom column mapping" else as.character(cfg$pipeline)
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Pipeline:</strong> %s</p>\n', pip_str))
if (is.list(cfg$pipeline) && !is.null(cfg$coord_offset) && cfg$coord_offset != 0L)
  cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Coordinate Offset:</strong> %d</p>\n', cfg$coord_offset))

cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Clustering:</strong> %s / %s</p>\n', cfg$cluster_dist, cfg$cluster_method))
cat(sprintf('<p><strong>DiffMeth:</strong> %s / %s (cutoff=%d%%, q&lt;%s)</p>\n',
            cfg$diff_overdispersion, cfg$diff_test, diff_cutoff_report, diff_qvalue_report))
if (isTRUE(cfg$perform_batch_correction))
  cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Batch correction:</strong> %s</p>\n', paste(cfg$batch_cols, collapse = ", ")))
if (isTRUE(cfg$perform_covariate_adj))
  cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Covariates:</strong> %s</p>\n', paste(cfg$covariates, collapse = ", ")))
cat('</div>\n')
```

## Samples

```{r samples_table, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(pheno_all) && !is.null(cfg$col_treatment)) {
  if (!is.null(pheno_analyzed) && nrow(pheno_analyzed) > 0) {
    tx_vals <- as.numeric(as.character(pheno_analyzed[[cfg$col_treatment]]))
    n_analyzed <- nrow(pheno_analyzed)
    n_ctrl <- sum(tx_vals == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    n_case <- sum(tx_vals == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    n_analyzed <- length(analyzed_ids)
    n_ctrl <- NA; n_case <- NA
  }

  cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value">%d</div><div class="label">Original</div></div>\n', nrow(pheno_all)))
  cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#2980b9;">%d</div><div class="label">Analyzed</div></div>\n', n_analyzed))
  if (!is.na(n_ctrl)) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#27ae60;">%d</div><div class="label">Controls</div></div>\n', n_ctrl))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#e74c3c;">%d</div><div class="label">Cases</div></div>\n', n_case))
  }
  if (length(excluded_ids) > 0)
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#e67e22;">%d</div><div class="label">Excluded</div></div>\n', length(excluded_ids)))
  cat('</div>\n\n')

  if (length(excluded_ids) > 0) {
    cat('<div class="excluded-box">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<strong>Excluded (%d):</strong> %s\n', length(excluded_ids), paste(excluded_ids, collapse = ", ")))
    cat('<br><em>Removed during QC.</em>\n</div>\n\n')
  }

  display_pheno <- pheno_all
  sid_col <- cfg$col_sampleID
  display_pheno$Status <- ifelse(display_pheno[[sid_col]] %in% excluded_ids, "Excluded",
                          ifelse(display_pheno[[sid_col]] %in% analyzed_ids, "Analyzed", "Unknown"))
  display_pheno <- display_pheno[order(display_pheno$Status != "Analyzed"), ]

  # ── Remove path columns from display ──
  hide_cols <- c("Path", "path", "FILE", "File", "file")
  if (!is.null(cfg$col_file_path)) hide_cols <- c(hide_cols, cfg$col_file_path)
  display_pheno <- display_pheno[, !colnames(display_pheno) %in% hide_cols, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (has_dt) {
    DT::datatable(display_pheno, options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE)) |>
      DT::formatStyle("Status", backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(
        c("Analyzed", "Excluded"), c("#d5f5e3", "#fadbd8")))
  } else {
    knitr::kable(display_pheno, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                 table.attr = 'class="table table-striped"')
  }
} else { cat("Phenotype not available.\n") }
```

---

# Quality Control {.tabset}

```{r qc_images, results='asis'}
qc_base <- file.path(res_dir, "QC")
if (dir.exists(qc_base)) {
  cov_dirs <- list.dirs(qc_base, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
  cov_dirs <- cov_dirs[grepl("cov_", basename(cov_dirs))]
  if (length(cov_dirs) > 0) {
    cov_vals <- as.numeric(gsub("cov_", "", basename(cov_dirs)))
    cov_dirs <- cov_dirs[order(cov_vals)]

    for (qc_dir in cov_dirs) {
      cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", gsub("_", " ", basename(qc_dir))))
      pngs <- list.files(qc_dir, "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
      if (length(pngs) == 0) { cat("No plots.\n"); next }
      rel <- gsub(paste0("^", normalizePath(qc_dir, winslash = "/"), "/?"), "",
                   normalizePath(pngs, winslash = "/"))
      subs <- dirname(rel); subs[subs == "."] <- "General"
      for (sd in unique(subs)) {
        cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", gsub("[/_]", " ", sd)))
        for (img in pngs[subs == sd]) {
          h <- embed_img(img)
          if (!is.null(h)) cat(sprintf("\n\n#### %s\n\n%s\n\n", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(img)), h))
        }
      }
    }
  } else { cat("No QC plots found.\n") }
} else { cat("QC directory not found.\n") }
```

---

# Comparative Analysis

```{r comp_analysis, results='asis'}
fig_dir <- file.path(res_dir, "Comparative_Analysis", "figures")

cat("## Sample Correlation\n\n")
h <- embed_img(file.path(fig_dir, "Sample_Correlation.png"))
if (!is.null(h)) cat(h) else cat("Not found.\n")

cat("\n\n## Hierarchical Clustering\n\n")
h <- embed_img(file.path(fig_dir, "Sample_Clustering.png"))
if (!is.null(h)) cat(h) else cat("Not found.\n")

if (!is.null(meth_obj)) {
  cat(sprintf('\n\n<div class="summary-box"><h4>United methylBase</h4>\n'))
  cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Common CpGs:</strong> %s</p>\n', format(nrow(meth_obj), big.mark = ",")))
  cat(sprintf('<p><strong>Samples:</strong> %d</p></div>\n', length(methylKit::getSampleID(meth_obj))))
}
```

---

# Differential Methylation {.tabset}

## Summary

```{r diffmeth_summary, results='asis'}
summary_df <- NULL

if (!is.null(diff_results) && length(diff_results) > 0) {
  cat('<div class="summary-box"><h4>Thresholds</h4>\n')
  cat(sprintf('<p>|diff| &ge; %d%%, q &lt; %s</p></div>\n\n', diff_cutoff_report, diff_qvalue_report))

  cutoffs <- sort(unique(c(diff_cutoff_report, 5, 10, 15, 25)))

  summary_rows <- lapply(names(diff_results), function(model) {
    raw_df <- tryCatch(methylKit::getData(diff_results[[model]]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(raw_df)) return(NULL)
    raw_df <- raw_df[!is.na(raw_df$qvalue) & !is.na(raw_df$meth.diff), ]
    row <- data.frame(Scenario = model, Total = nrow(raw_df), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    for (cut in cutoffs) {
      sig <- raw_df$qvalue < diff_qvalue_report & abs(raw_df$meth.diff) >= cut
      row[[paste0("DMC_", cut, "pct")]] <- sum(sig)
    }
    sig_cfg <- raw_df$qvalue < diff_qvalue_report & abs(raw_df$meth.diff) >= diff_cutoff_report
    row$Hyper <- sum(sig_cfg & raw_df$meth.diff > 0)
    row$Hypo  <- sum(sig_cfg & raw_df$meth.diff < 0)
    row
  })
  summary_df <- do.call(rbind, summary_rows)

  if (!is.null(summary_df) && nrow(summary_df) > 0) {
    dmc_col <- paste0("DMC_", diff_cutoff_report, "pct")

    # ── Metric cards for EACH scenario ──
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(summary_df))) {
      row <- summary_df[i, ]
      cat(sprintf('<h4>%s</h4>\n', row$Scenario))
      cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value">%s</div><div class="label">Tested</div></div>\n',
                  format(row$Total, big.mark = ",")))
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#e74c3c;">%s</div><div class="label">DMCs</div></div>\n',
                  format(row[[dmc_col]], big.mark = ",")))
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#c0392b;">%s</div><div class="label">Hyper</div></div>\n',
                  format(row$Hyper, big.mark = ",")))
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#2980b9;">%s</div><div class="label">Hypo</div></div>\n',
                  format(row$Hypo, big.mark = ",")))
      cat('</div>\n\n')
    }

    cat("\n\n**Comparison table:**\n\n")
    print(knitr::kable(summary_df, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                 table.attr = 'class="table table-striped table-bordered"'))
  }
} else { cat("No diff results.\n") }
```

```{r threshold_curve, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(diff_results) && length(diff_results) > 0) {
  curve <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(diff_results), function(m) {
    d <- tryCatch(methylKit::getData(diff_results[[m]]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(d)) return(NULL)
    d <- d[!is.na(d$qvalue) & !is.na(d$meth.diff), ]
    do.call(rbind, lapply(seq(0, 50, 2), function(c) {
      data.frame(Scenario = m, Cutoff = c,
                 DMCs = sum(d$qvalue < diff_qvalue_report & abs(d$meth.diff) >= c))
    }))
  }))
  if (!is.null(curve) && nrow(curve) > 0) {
    print(
      ggplot(curve, aes(Cutoff, DMCs, colour = Scenario)) +
        geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = diff_cutoff_report, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, big.mark = ",")) +
        labs(title = "DMC Count vs Threshold", x = "Min |Diff| (%)", y = "DMCs") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 12) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    )
  }
}
```

## Volcano Plots {.tabset}

```{r volcanos, results='asis', fig.height=6}
if (!is.null(diff_results)) {
  for (model in names(diff_results)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", model))
    fd <- tryCatch(methylKit::getData(diff_results[[model]]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fd) || nrow(fd) == 0) { cat("No data.\n"); next }
    fd <- fd[!is.na(fd$qvalue) & !is.na(fd$meth.diff), ]
    if (nrow(fd) == 0) { cat("All NA.\n"); next }

    minq <- min(fd$qvalue[fd$qvalue > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.infinite(minq)) minq <- 1e-300
    fd$qvalue[fd$qvalue == 0] <- minq
    fd$Status <- "NS"
    sig <- fd$qvalue < diff_qvalue_report & abs(fd$meth.diff) >= diff_cutoff_report
    fd$Status[sig & fd$meth.diff > 0] <- "Hyper"
    fd$Status[sig & fd$meth.diff < 0] <- "Hypo"
    fd$logQ <- -log10(fd$qvalue)

    cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value">%s</div><div class="label">Tested</div></div>\n', format(nrow(fd), big.mark = ",")))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#c0392b;">%d</div><div class="label">Hyper</div></div>\n', sum(fd$Status == "Hyper")))
    cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#2980b9;">%d</div><div class="label">Hypo</div></div>\n', sum(fd$Status == "Hypo")))
    cat('</div>\n\n')

    ds <- fd[fd$Status != "NS", ]
    dn <- fd[fd$Status == "NS", ]
    if (nrow(dn) > 5000) dn <- dn[sample(nrow(dn), 5000), ]
    viz <- rbind(ds, dn)
    viz$Status <- factor(viz$Status, levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo", "NS"))

    print(
      ggplot(viz, aes(meth.diff, logQ, colour = Status)) +
        geom_point(alpha = .5, size = .8) +
        scale_colour_manual(values = c(Hyper = "#c0392b", Hypo = "#2980b9", NS = "grey70"), drop = FALSE) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(-diff_cutoff_report, diff_cutoff_report), linetype = "dashed") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(diff_qvalue_report), linetype = "dashed") +
        labs(title = sprintf("%s - %d Hyper / %d Hypo", model, sum(fd$Status == "Hyper"), sum(fd$Status == "Hypo")),
             x = "Diff (%)", y = "-log10(q)") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 12) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    )
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

## DMC Distribution {.tabset}

```{r dmc_dist, results='asis', fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(diff_results)) {
  for (model in names(diff_results)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", model))
    fd <- tryCatch(methylKit::getData(diff_results[[model]]), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fd)) { cat("No data.\n"); next }
    fd <- fd[!is.na(fd$qvalue) & !is.na(fd$meth.diff), ]
    sig <- fd$qvalue < diff_qvalue_report & abs(fd$meth.diff) >= diff_cutoff_report
    if (sum(sig) == 0) { cat("No DMCs.\n"); next }
    ds <- fd[sig, ]; ds$Dir <- ifelse(ds$meth.diff > 0, "Hyper", "Hypo")
    ds$chr_f <- factor(gsub("chr", "", ds$chr), levels = c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y", "M"))
    cc <- as.data.frame(table(ds$chr_f, ds$Dir), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    colnames(cc) <- c("Chr", "Dir", "N"); cc <- cc[cc$N > 0, ]
    if (nrow(cc) > 0) {
      print(
        ggplot(cc, aes(Chr, N, fill = Dir)) + geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = .85) +
          scale_fill_manual(values = c(Hyper = "#c0392b", Hypo = "#2980b9")) +
          labs(title = model, x = "Chr", y = "Count") +
          theme_minimal(base_size = 11) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
      )
    }
    print(
      ggplot(ds, aes(meth.diff, fill = Dir)) + geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = .7) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = c(Hyper = "#c0392b", Hypo = "#2980b9")) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(-diff_cutoff_report, diff_cutoff_report), linetype = "dashed") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Diff Distribution - %s", model), x = "Diff (%)", y = "Count") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
    )
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

---

# Genomic Annotation {.tabset}

```{r annotation, results='asis', fig.height=5}
annot_dir <- file.path(res_dir, "Annotation")
if (dir.exists(annot_dir) && has_readxl) {
  afs <- list.files(annot_dir, "^Annotated_DMCs_.*\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(afs) > 0) {
    for (af in afs) {
      mn <- gsub("^Annotated_DMCs_|\\.xlsx$", "", basename(af))
      cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s\n\n", mn))
      da <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(readxl::read_excel(af)), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(da) || nrow(da) == 0) { cat("No data.\n"); next }

      ad <- if (!is.null(cfg$annot_diff_cutoff)) cfg$annot_diff_cutoff else 25
      if (ad != diff_cutoff_report)
        cat(sprintf('<div class="warn-box">Annotation used |diff| &ge; %d%% (pipeline: %d%%)</div>\n\n', ad, diff_cutoff_report))

      # ── Count unique DMCs vs annotation rows ──
      if (all(c("chr", "start") %in% colnames(da))) {
        n_unique <- length(unique(paste0(da$chr, ":", da$start)))
      } else {
        n_unique <- nrow(da)
      }

      # ── Annotation count ──
      cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value">%s</div><div class="label">Annotations found</div></div>\n',
                  format(nrow(da), big.mark = ",")))
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value">%d%%</div><div class="label">Diff cutoff</div></div>\n',
                  ad))
      cat('</div>\n\n')

      if ("annot.type" %in% colnames(da)) {
        da$Feature <- "Other"
        da$Feature[grepl("promoter", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "Promoters"
        da$Feature[grepl("exon", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "Exons"
        da$Feature[grepl("intron", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "Introns"
        da$Feature[grepl("intergenic", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "Intergenic"
        da$Feature[grepl("UTR", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "UTRs"
        da$Feature[grepl("CpG", da$annot.type, TRUE)] <- "CpG Islands"
        fc <- as.data.frame(table(da$Feature), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        colnames(fc) <- c("Feature", "Count")
        fc$Pct <- round(100 * fc$Count / sum(fc$Count), 1)

        print(
          ggplot(fc, aes("", Count, fill = Feature)) + geom_col(width = 1, alpha = .85) +
            coord_polar("y") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
            labs(title = sprintf("%s (%s annotations)", mn, format(nrow(da), big.mark = ","))) +
            theme_void(base_size = 12)
        )
        cat("\n\n")
        print(knitr::kable(fc[order(-fc$Count), ], format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                            table.attr = 'class="table table-striped"'))
      }
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  } else { cat("No annotation files.\n") }
} else { cat("Annotation dir not found.\n") }
```

---

# Signature Validation {.tabset}

```{r val_gate, results='asis'}
if (!has_val) {
  cat('<div class="info-box">No validation results found.</div>\n')
}
```

```{r val_overview, eval=has_val, results='asis'}
cat("## Overview\n\n")

bench <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(val_results), function(nm) {
  r <- val_results[[nm]]
  is_default <- grepl("^DMC_default_", nm)
  perf <- NA
  if (!is.null(r$svm_model))
    perf <- round(max(r$svm_model$results[[r$metric_used]], na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  data.frame(
    Signature = nm, Source = if (is_default) "Auto" else "User",
    CpGs = r$n_cpgs, Metric = if (!is.null(r$svm_model)) r$metric_used else "N/A",
    Performance = perf,
    Accuracy = if (!is.null(r$accuracy) && !is.na(r$accuracy)) sprintf("%.1f%%", r$accuracy * 100) else "N/A",
    Silhouette = round(r$silhouette, 3), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
bench <- bench[order(-bench$Silhouette), ]

cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
cat(sig_card(length(val_results), "Validated", "#2980b9"))
cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.3f", max(bench$Silhouette)), "Best Sil.", "#27ae60"))
cat(sig_card(sprintf("%d/%d", sum(!is.na(bench$Performance)), nrow(bench)), "SVM OK", "#e67e22"))
cat('</div>\n\n')

print(knitr::kable(bench, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
             table.attr = 'class="table table-striped table-bordered" style="font-size:13px;"'))
```

```{r val_details, eval=has_val, results='asis', fig.width=10, fig.height=7}
for (sig_name in names(val_results)) {
  res <- val_results[[sig_name]]
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {.tabset}\n\n", sig_name))

  # ── Metrics ──
  cat("### Metrics\n\n")
  sil_col <- if (res$silhouette > 0.5) "#27ae60" else if (res$silhouette > 0.25) "#f39c12" else "#e74c3c"

  cat('<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin:10px 0;">\n')
  cat(sig_card(res$n_cpgs, "CpGs", "#34495e"))
  cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.3f", res$silhouette), "Silhouette", sil_col))
  if (!is.null(res$accuracy) && !is.na(res$accuracy))
    cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.1f%%", res$accuracy * 100), "Accuracy", "#8e44ad"))
  if (!is.null(res$auc) && !is.na(res$auc))
    cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.3f", res$auc), "AUC", "#e74c3c"))
  if (!is.null(res$sensitivity) && !is.na(res$sensitivity))
    cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.1f%%", res$sensitivity * 100), "Sensitivity", "#3498db"))
  if (!is.null(res$specificity) && !is.na(res$specificity))
    cat(sig_card(sprintf("%.1f%%", res$specificity * 100), "Specificity", "#27ae60"))
  cat('</div>\n\n')

  sil_v <- res$silhouette
  interp <- if (sil_v > 0.7) list("Strong separation", "good-box")
            else if (sil_v > 0.5) list("Reasonable structure", "info-box")
            else if (sil_v > 0.25) list("Weak structure", "warn-box")
            else list("No structure", "excluded-box")
  cat(sprintf('<div class="%s"><strong>Silhouette = %.3f</strong> -- %s</div>\n\n',
              interp[[2]], sil_v, interp[[1]]))

  if (!is.null(res$confusion)) {
    cat("**Confusion Matrix:**\n\n")
    print(knitr::kable(as.data.frame.matrix(res$confusion), format = "html",
                        table.attr = 'class="table table-bordered" style="width:auto;"'))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  # ── PCA ──
  if (!is.null(res$pca)) {
    cat("### PCA\n\n")
    pca <- res$pca
    pdf <- data.frame(PC1 = pca$x[,1], PC2 = pca$x[,2],
                       Group = res$raw_data$Class, Sample = rownames(res$raw_data))
    ve <- round(summary(pca)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100, 1)

    p <- ggplot(pdf, aes(PC1, PC2, colour = Group)) +
      geom_point(size = 3.5, alpha = .85) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = c("CTL" = "#3498db", "Test" = "#e74c3c")) +
      labs(title = sprintf("PCA - %s (%d CpGs)", sig_name, res$n_cpgs),
           x = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", ve[1]), y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", ve[2])) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")

    grp_n <- table(pdf$Group)
    if (any(grp_n >= 3))
      p <- p + stat_ellipse(level = .95, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = .7,
                             data = pdf[pdf$Group %in% names(grp_n[grp_n >= 3]), ])
    print(p)
    cat("\n\n")

    # Scree
    ve_all <- summary(pca)$importance[2, ] * 100
    ns <- min(10, length(ve_all))
    sdf <- data.frame(PC = seq_len(ns), V = ve_all[seq_len(ns)])
    print(
      ggplot(sdf, aes(PC, V)) + geom_col(fill = "#2980b9", alpha = .8) +
        geom_line(colour = "#e74c3c", linewidth = 1) + geom_point(colour = "#e74c3c", size = 2) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = sdf$PC) +
        labs(title = "Scree Plot", x = "PC", y = "Variance (%)") + theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
    )
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  # ── Heatmap ──
  if (!is.null(res$beta_matrix) && has_pheatmap) {
    cat("### Heatmap\n\n")
    bm <- res$beta_matrix
    if (nrow(bm) > 150) {
      rv <- apply(bm, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
      bm <- bm[order(rv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:150], , drop = FALSE]
    }
    annot_c <- data.frame(Group = res$raw_data$Class, row.names = colnames(bm))
    tryCatch({
      hm <- pheatmap::pheatmap(bm, scale = "row",
        show_rownames = nrow(bm) <= 60, show_colnames = ncol(bm) <= 30,
        annotation_col = annot_c,
        annotation_colors = list(Group = c("CTL" = "#3498db", "Test" = "#e74c3c")),
        clustering_method = "ward.D2",
        color = colorRampPalette(c("#2980b9", "#ecf0f1", "#c0392b"))(100),
        border_color = NA, main = sprintf("%s - %d CpGs", sig_name, nrow(bm)),
        silent = TRUE)
      grid::grid.newpage()
      grid::grid.draw(hm$gtable)
    }, error = function(e) cat("Heatmap failed.\n"))
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  # ── ROC ──
  if (!is.null(res$svm_model) && res$metric_used == "ROC") {
    cat("### ROC\n\n")
    preds <- res$svm_model$pred
    if (!is.null(preds)) {
      if ("C" %in% colnames(preds) && !is.null(res$svm_model$bestTune$C))
        preds <- preds[preds$C == res$svm_model$bestTune$C, ]
      lvls <- levels(preds$obs)
      if (length(lvls) >= 2 && lvls[1] %in% colnames(preds)) {
        tryCatch({
          roc_obj <- pROC::roc(preds$obs, preds[[lvls[1]]])
          rdf <- data.frame(FPR = 1 - roc_obj$specificities, TPR = roc_obj$sensitivities)
          auc_v <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
          print(
            ggplot(rdf, aes(FPR, TPR)) + geom_line(colour = "#e74c3c", linewidth = 1.2) +
              geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
              annotate("text", x = .6, y = .3, size = 5, fontface = "bold",
                       label = sprintf("AUC = %.3f", auc_v)) +
              labs(title = sig_name, x = "1-Specificity", y = "Sensitivity") +
              theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
          )
        }, error = function(e) cat("ROC failed.\n"))
        cat("\n\n")
      }
    }
  }

  # ── Variable Importance ──
  if (!is.null(res$svm_model)) {
    cat("### Top Loci\n\n")
    imp_obj <- tryCatch(caret::varImp(res$svm_model, scale = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(imp_obj) && nrow(imp_obj$importance) > 0) {
      imp <- imp_obj$importance
      imp$Score <- if ("Overall" %in% colnames(imp)) imp$Overall else apply(imp, 1, max)
      imp$Raw <- rownames(imp)
      known <- names(res$genes_map)
      imp$Locus <- vapply(imp$Raw, function(x) {
        if (x %in% known) return(x)
        x2 <- gsub("\\.", ":", x); x2 <- sub(":([0-9]+):([0-9]+)$", ":\\1-\\2", x2)
        if (x2 %in% known) return(x2)
        x3 <- gsub("^X", "", x); x3 <- gsub("\\.", ":", x3); x3 <- sub(":([0-9]+):([0-9]+)$", ":\\1-\\2", x3)
        if (x3 %in% known) return(x3)
        x
      }, character(1))

      top <- head(imp[order(-imp$Score), ], 20)
      top$Locus <- factor(top$Locus, levels = rev(top$Locus))

      print(
        ggplot(top, aes(Locus, Score)) + geom_col(fill = "#c0392b", alpha = .8) +
          coord_flip() + labs(title = "Top 20 Discriminative Loci", x = "", y = "Importance") +
          theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
      )
      cat("\n\n")
    }
  }
}
```

---

# Exported Files

```{r files}
af <- list.files(res_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = FALSE)
if (length(af) > 0) {
  edf <- data.frame(File = af, Type = toupper(tools::file_ext(af)),
    Size = vapply(file.path(res_dir, af), function(f) {
      sz <- file.info(f)$size; if (is.na(sz)) "?"
      else if (sz>1e9) sprintf("%.1f GB",sz/1e9) else if (sz>1e6) sprintf("%.1f MB",sz/1e6)
      else if (sz>1e3) sprintf("%.1f KB",sz/1e3) else paste0(sz," B")
    }, character(1)), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (has_dt) DT::datatable(edf, options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE))
  else knitr::kable(edf, format = "html", row.names = FALSE, table.attr = 'class="table table-striped"')
}
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
